name: GreenCell, Inc.
summary: GreenCell, Inc., a development stage company, engages in developing gas system and appliance igniters, oxygen sensors, fuel cells, and brake pad products primarily for original equipment manufacturers, manufacturers, industry distributors and resellers that operate in the home device, automotive, heating and cooling, and medical industries. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Penn Yan, New York.
